contact.inquiryDesc: Have a question about visits, events, or community services?

servicesPage.pageDescription: Explore the educational programs and Islamic learning opportunities at Masjid Rahma.
servicesPage.rahmaSchoolDesc: A structured Islamic education program for children and youth. Students learn Quran recitation, Arabic language, and Islamic studies in a supportive and nurturing environment.
servicesPage.darsDesc: Regular Islamic lectures and lessons for adults covering Quran tafseer, hadith, fiqh, and seerah. Open to all members of the community seeking to deepen their knowledge of Islam.

hub.newMosqueDesc: Support the construction of our new mosque and community center.
hub.servicesDesc: Rahma School, Dars, and Islamic learning programs.
hub.contactDesc: Get in touch for visits, events, or community services.

membership.pageDescription: Register as a member of Masjid Rahma. Your information is sent securely and is not stored on our servers.
membership.formDescription: Fill in your details below. All fields are required.

ungRahma.title: Ung Rahma
ungRahma.description: Ung Rahma is Masjid Rahma's youth program, designed for young Muslims aged 13 to 25 in Oslo. The program is built on three pillars: activities such as sports, trips and social events that foster friendship and belonging; learning through Islamic studies, Quran education and personal development; and a mentorship program where experienced role models guide youth in faith and everyday life.
ungRahma.mobileDescription: Youth program for ages 13–25. Sports, trips, Quran studies and mentorship.

rahmaSkole.title: Rahma School
rahmaSkole.description: Rahma School offers structured Islamic education for children and youth in a safe and nurturing environment. Students receive Quran instruction with tajwid and memorization under qualified teachers, Arabic language courses from beginner to advanced levels with a focus on comprehension and communication, and Islamic studies covering fiqh, aqidah and seerah in age-appropriate classes.
rahmaSkole.mobileDescription: Islamic education for children and youth. Quran, Arabic and Islamic studies.
rahmaSkole.highlight3: Fiqh, aqidah and the Prophet's biography

bliMedlem.title: Become a Member
bliMedlem.description: Masjid Rahma is a growing community in the heart of Oslo, and your membership makes a real difference. As a member, you directly support the mosque's operations, educational programs for children and youth, social initiatives and the vision of building a new, modern Islamic center. Registration is simple and secure — your information is sent encrypted and is not stored on our servers.
bliMedlem.mobileDescription: Support the mosque, programs and the vision for a new Islamic center in Oslo.
bliMedlem.highlight1: Support the mosque and our programs
bliMedlem.highlight3: Help build the mosque of the future

nyMoske.title: The New Masjid Rahma
nyMoske.description: We are building a new, modern Islamic center for Oslo — a place that unites worship, education and community under one roof for generations to come. The project includes prayer halls, classrooms, wudhu areas, a beautiful mihrab and facilities for the whole family. You can contribute to everything from the construction fund and sound system to furnishing individual rooms. Invest in your akhirah.
nyMoske.mobileDescription: New Islamic center with prayer halls, classrooms and family facilities. Invest in your akhirah.
nyMoske.highlight1: Prayer halls, classrooms and family areas
nyMoske.highlight2: Contribute to specific parts of the building

footer.brand: Connecting the community through faith, education, and service since 1995.
